role: Root directory of the ArchSpine project, containing build automation scripts, demonstration workflows, verification tools, and release management utilities.
responsibility: Collectively, these scripts automate the build, test, verification, and release processes for ArchSpine, enabling efficient development cycles and ensuring software quality and consistency across the project lifecycle.

children.role: Build automation script for the ArchSpine project.
Demonstration script for ArchSpine CLI workflow
Development build watcher script that polls for source file changes and triggers automatic rebuilds.
Demonstration script for the ArchSpine CLI, showcasing a basic build-and-run workflow.
Defines the automated placeholder publishing step to reserve the ArchSpine npm package name before real releases.
Automated release gate script for validating software build, tests, and packaging before release.
Database schema migration script for ArchSpine's cache
Validate all protocol schema definitions and example files for consistency and compliance with ArchSpine's specification contracts.
